posts.text: HFCL Up 150% in Just 6 Weeks - What's Really Driving This Rally? 🤔 — HFCL has delivered a staggering 150% return in the last 6 weeks, leaving many investors wondering what the market is pricing in. Tomorrow’s concall could provide some answers, but what do you think is behind this move? Is the market expecting a blowout set of results? Is it the growing optimism around defence and telecom infrastructure spending? Could it be a large order pipeline that the market already knows about? Or is this simply a case of momentum and FOMO pushing valuations higher? At current levels, the stock seems to…
